children.name: Text
children.characters:
Discover the perfect balance between Moroccan heritage
and architectural minimalism. Bespoke pieces built for
generations.

children.name: Text
children.characters:
Explore our curated collection of
signature pieces, ready for immediate
delivery to your sanctuary.

children.name: Text
children.characters:
Bring your unique vision to life with our
master craftsmen. Tailored dimensions,
materials, and soul.

children.name: Soul in every Joint, Story in every Grain.
children.characters:
Soul in every Joint,
Story in every Grain.

children.name: Atelier Maghreb is more than a workshop; it is a bridge between the ancient soul of Moroccan craftsmanship and the refined clarity of modern architecture. We source the finest Atlas Walnut and Cedar, treating every plank with the reverence it deserves.
children.characters:
Atelier Maghreb is more than a workshop; it is a bridge
between the ancient soul of Moroccan craftsmanship and
the refined clarity of modern architecture. We source the
finest Atlas Walnut and Cedar, treating every plank with the
reverence it deserves.

children.name: Traditional joinery made to last 100+ years.
children.characters:
Traditional joinery made to last
100+ years.

children.name: Text
children.characters:
From initial sketch to final installation, our process is a collaborative dance
of vision and craft.

children.name: Text
children.characters:
A deep dive into your space,
lifestyle, and aesthetic desires.

children.name: Text
children.characters:
Hand-picking the specific wood
slabs for your piece.

children.name: Text
children.characters:
Technical visualization for scale
and proportion approval.

children.name: Text
children.characters:
Weeks of meticulous work in our
Marrakech atelier.

children.name: Text
children.characters:
Hand-rubbed oil finishes and
final quality inspection.

children.name: Text
children.characters:
White-glove delivery and
positioning in your sanctuary.

children.name: Text
children.characters:
Dark, dense, and prestigious. The
cornerstone of our luxury collection.

children.name: Text
children.characters:
Light, airy, and resilient. Ideal for
modern architectural spaces.

children.name: Text
children.characters:
Distinct fragrance and warm tones.
A nod to traditional Moroccan riads.

children.name: "In the heart of Marrakech, silence is a luxury. But in our workshop, silence is the prerequisite for precision. We don't just build furniture; we curate silence."
children.characters:
"In the heart of Marrakech, silence is a luxury.
But in our workshop, silence is the prerequisite
for precision. We don't just build furniture; we
curate silence."

children.name: Every piece that leaves our floor carries the scent of sawdust and the echo of a hundred chisel strikes. We invite you to witness the birth of your vision in person or through our digital workshop journal.
children.characters:
Every piece that leaves our floor carries the scent of
sawdust and the echo of a hundred chisel strikes. We
invite you to witness the birth of your vision in person
or through our digital workshop journal.

children.name: Text
children.characters:
Whether it's a single statement piece or a full residential commission, our master
artisans are ready.

children.name: Handcrafted in Morocco. Modern Architectural Minimalism. Built for Generations.
children.characters:
Handcrafted in Morocco. Modern
Architectural Minimalism. Built for
Generations.

children.name: Designed to the millimeter for your specific environment. We eliminate dead space and celebrate the unique architecture of your home.
children.characters:
Designed to the millimeter for your specific
environment. We eliminate dead space and
celebrate the unique architecture of your
home.

children.name: Sustainably sourced Atlas Cedar, Walnut, and reclaimed Oak. We hand-select every slab for its grain pattern and structural integrity.
children.characters:
Sustainably sourced Atlas Cedar, Walnut,
and reclaimed Oak. We hand-select every
slab for its grain pattern and structural
integrity.

children.name: Mortise and tenon joinery that defies time. Our pieces are not just furniture; they are heirlooms built for generations of use.
children.characters:
Mortise and tenon joinery that defies time.
Our pieces are not just furniture; they are
heirlooms built for generations of use.

children.name: Text
children.characters:
Transform your architectural vision into tangible reality. Our master
woodworkers bridge centuries of Moroccan tradition with
contemporary minimalist aesthetics to create furniture that belongs
only to you.

children.name: Initial consultation to discuss your needs, aesthetic preferences, and spatial constraints.
children.characters:
Initial consultation to
discuss your needs,
aesthetic preferences, and
spatial constraints.

timber slabs and custom

material library.

the manual construction

children.name: Professional installation by our specialist team to ensure a perfect structural fit.
children.characters:

Explore our tactile palette of sustainably
sourced timbers and hand-rubbed finishes.
Each material is chosen for its character, aging
potential, and structural reliability.

children.name: Text
children.characters:
Handcrafted in our Casablanca workshop, each piece combines structural
Moroccan architectural elements with the finest sustainable hardwoods.

children.name: Modern furniture inspired by the heritage and architecture of the Maghreb. Every piece is a testament to timeless craftsmanship.
children.characters:
Modern furniture inspired by the
heritage and architecture of the
Maghreb. Every piece is a
testament to timeless
craftsmanship.

children.name: The Atlas Solid Walnut Dining Table
children.characters:
The Atlas Solid
Walnut Dining
Table

children.name: A testament to Moroccan architectural minimalism. The Atlas table features a heavy, solid walnut top supported by precision-milled geometric legs, celebrating the raw beauty of natural grain and centuries-old joinery techniques.
children.characters:
A testament to Moroccan architectural minimalism.
The Atlas table features a heavy, solid walnut top
supported by precision-milled geometric legs,
celebrating the raw beauty of natural grain and
centuries-old joinery techniques.

children.name: Dust regularly with a soft, dry cloth. Avoid direct sunlight and extreme humidity. Every 6 months, apply a light layer of natural furniture wax to maintain the walnut's luster and protection.
children.characters:
Dust regularly with a soft, dry cloth. Avoid direct sunlight and
extreme humidity. Every 6 months, apply a light layer of natural
furniture wax to maintain the walnut's luster and protection.

children.name: We offer complimentary white-glove delivery and assembly across Morocco. Our specialized team will deliver, unpack, and position your furniture in its final location, ensuring every detail meets our workshop standards.
children.characters:
We offer complimentary white-glove delivery and
assembly across Morocco. Our specialized team will
deliver, unpack, and position your furniture in its final
location, ensuring every detail meets our workshop
standards.

children.name: "The craftsmanship is beyond expectations. The wood is so tactile and the grain is stunning. It’s truly an heirloom piece."
